intent: 800-credit Recraft pass for the CongiNuroHub educator-facing live simulation dashboard, extending NeoWakeUP visual language into a classroom cognition aesthetic.
shared_prompt_appendix: CongiNuroHub live cognition lab visual system. Transparent background unless asset is a complete panel. High readability for classroom projection, real-time simulation dashboard use, and browser compositing. Aesthetic direction: humane scientific mysticism, lucid systems cartography, educational seriousness, disciplined ornament, no generic enterprise UI. Design for crisp layering and animation slicing.

assets.name: conginurohub_control_hub_background
assets.prompt: Full panel background for a browser-based cognitive development hub dashboard, educational but awe-struck, layered information architecture, calm luminous field, precise panel zoning, no text.
assets.negative_prompt: people, watermark, logo, blurry geometry, mobile app screenshot

assets.name: cognitive_habitat_orbits
assets.prompt: Transparent sheet of orbital habitat ring graphics for cognitive-development hubs, concentric educational ecology, clean segmentation, projection-friendly contrast.

assets.name: artisapiens_avatar_sheet
assets.prompt: Transparent sheet of six distinct ArtiSapiens avatar silhouettes for educational simulation dashboards, symbolic but humane, each separated and readable at small sizes.

assets.name: consensus_wave_spritesheet
assets.prompt: Transparent single-row eight-frame sprite sheet showing a live consensus wave pulse for cognition dashboards, elegant looping energy band.

assets.name: learning_flux_spritesheet
assets.prompt: Transparent single-row eight-frame sprite sheet of learning flux particles clustering and dispersing, clear loop, classroom science aesthetic.

assets.name: directive_dials_set
assets.prompt: Transparent set of four specialized directive dials for curiosity, equity, challenge, and reflection, ceremonial-scientific, browser UI compositing ready.
assets.negative_prompt: text labels, noisy controls, realistic photo UI

assets.name: metric_bar_set
assets.prompt: Transparent set of metrics bars and gauge ornaments for consensus, knowledge, reflection, coherence, and friction, sharp and projection-safe.

assets.name: font_uppercase_math_logic
assets.prompt: Custom uppercase alphanumeric reference sheet plus major mathematical and logical symbols for CongiNuroHub, strict educational legibility, technical elegance, transparent background.

assets.name: font_lowercase_extended_symbols
assets.prompt: Custom lowercase and extended symbolic reference sheet for CongiNuroHub including arrows, set notation, calculus marks, and logic operators, transparent background.

assets.name: live_feed_frame_overlay
assets.prompt: Transparent widescreen overlay frame for live rendered simulation feeds, elegant laboratory viewport, subtle decorative intelligence motifs, no text.
